level_signals: Expected to operate with high degree of ownership and autonomy
Expected to present to senior leadership and influence cross-functionally

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 5+ years of product management experience, ideally in fintech, lending, or platform-focused roles
Proven track record of owning complex product areas or platforms and delivering measurable business impact
Experience defining product strategy and driving execution across multiple teams or squads
Strong systems thinking, with the ability to connect user experiences, platform capabilities, and business outcomes
Experience working on technically complex systems, with the ability to partner deeply with engineering on architecture and trade-offs
Data-driven mindset with experience defining metrics, running experiments, and using insights to inform decisions
Exceptional communication and stakeholder management skills, including experience influencing across teams and presenting to senior leadership
Ability to operate with a high degree of ownership and autonomy in ambiguous, fast-paced environments

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience with lending or financial services products, particularly originations or underwriting flows
Familiarity with credit decisioning systems or risk models
Experience building platform capabilities or shared infrastructure used across multiple teams
Experience optimizing application funnels, conversion, and user flows
Background working with servicing, collections, or post-origination systems
Experience driving large-scale technical initiatives requiring cross-team alignment

explicitly_excluded: Remote work from Hawaii or Alaska not accommodated due to insurance coverage issues

scope.surface: Originations Core platform within the Borrow business unit — Borrow web and mobile experience, reusable UI systems, application entry points, application data models, credit decisioning infrastructure
primary_metrics_inferred: Conversion rate across loan application funnel
Platform velocity and reusability across product teams
core_responsibilities: Define and drive the product vision, strategy, and multi-quarter roadmap for Originations Core, spanning platform capabilities and member-facing experiences
Own and evolve the Borrow experience across web and mobile, including application entry points, flows, and supporting UI systems
Lead the development of reusable UI components and shared capabilities that enable consistency and velocity across multiple product teams
Drive strategy and execution for core originations infrastructure, including application data models and credit decisioning systems
Act as the central product partner for cross-functional domains such as servicing, collections, and settlements, ensuring seamless end-to-end member journeys
Partner with multiple PMs and engineering teams to align roadmaps, manage dependencies, and drive cohesive product outcomes across the Borrow ecosystem
Identify and lead high-impact technical initiatives, building alignment and buy-in across teams to execute against a broader platform roadmap
Define success metrics and use data to evaluate performance, identify opportunities, and guide prioritization
Balance short-term delivery with long-term platform investments, making thoughtful trade-offs to support scalability, reliability, and business growth
Communicate product strategy, progress, and insights effectively to senior leadership and cross-functional stakeholders

green_flags: Clear product surface and ownership area described in detail
Role sits at the center of a core business unit (Borrow / lending), indicating strategic importance
Encourages experience equivalents to a bachelor's degree
San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance compliance mentioned, signals inclusive hiring
Explicitly lists reasonable accommodations for disabilities
red_flags: Compensation range not disclosed despite JD stating 'The base pay range for this role is listed below' — range appears to be missing from the JD body
Location type is unclear — JD does not specify whether this role is remote, hybrid, or on-site (only excludes Hawaii and Alaska)
Visa sponsorship and work authorization not addressed
Posting first seen and last updated dates not available

scope.business_model (inferred from company description as national bank offering personal loans)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly named in JD)
location.type (not stated; marked unclear — only exclusion of HI/AK mentioned, implying some remote eligibility)

The 'ideally in fintech, lending, or platform-focused roles' qualifier on the 5+ years requirement creates ambiguity: the years_of_experience is hard but the industry context is soft. Classified as hard for years, with industry context captured in the field.

Location type is not stated. The only location signal is 'unable to accommodate remote work from Hawaii or Alaska', which implies remote eligibility in other US states but does not clarify hybrid vs. fully remote. Marked as 'unclear'.
